name: shorts-editor-rbw
description: San xuat shorts video thanh pham cho ROBOWORLD tu footage buoi quay — phan tich source, de xuat kich ban theo 3 kieu dung (highlight+nhac / theo loi thoai san co / ghep canh+voice-over), tu dung bang ffmpeg theo dung style Roboworld va xuat video + caption ra thu muc Final.
